description: Androgyny is the trend of the day and these shoes from catwalk are perfect for this look with their smartly cut design. The nubuck toe foxing add a relaxed touch to the shoe. UpperCanvas upper with synthetic overlays at the heel cup and nubuck overlay at the toe box Central lace-ups for a customised FitPadded sockliner for instep comfortOutsoleNon-slip TPU outsole with herringbone lugs at the forefoot and midfootShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
